targetAudience: All fitness levels seeking comprehensive, intelligent coaching

keyRequirements.tieredAccess: Free AI Assistant vs Premium Dr. Lift with full features
keyRequirements.multiplePersonalities: Dr. Lift (science) + Coach Rico (motivational) + future expansion
keyRequirements.injuryIntegration: Complete safety system with contraindications and adaptations
keyRequirements.lifestyleCoaching: Holistic approach including sleep, stress, nutrition
keyRequirements.periodization: Long-term goal planning and training periodization

implementationPhases: Phase 1: Core AI Coaching (Onboarding, Tiered Access, Dr. Lift)
Phase 2: Intelligence Features (Plateau Detection, Injury Integration, Social)
Phase 3: Holistic Coaching (Lifestyle Integration, Periodization, Coach Rico)
Phase 4: Ecosystem Integration (Cross-platform, APIs, Advanced Features)
uniquePositioning: Most comprehensive AI coaching platform in fitness industry
Deepest data integration and contextual awareness
Industry-leading injury integration and safety features

technicalArchitecture.modularAI: Core engine with pluggable intelligence modules
technicalArchitecture.dataIntegration: Workout, lifestyle, social, external data layers
